scripts.test:mock: node mock-life-tools/bin/life.js scene.detect --text "我不知道接下来干嘛" && node mock-life-tools/bin/life.js activity.discover --location "朝阳大悦城" --time "16:40" --weather rain --explore-level medium && node mock-life-tools/bin/life.js broker.propose-groups --request-id broker_req_001
scripts.test:trip: node mock-life-tools/bin/life.js trip.parse --text "周末想去杭州玩2天" --destination "杭州" --duration "2天" --budget 2000 && node mock-life-tools/bin/life.js trip.generate --destination "杭州" --duration "2天" --budget 2000
scripts.test:inspiration: node mock-life-tools/bin/life.js inspiration.get --location "望京" --weather "小雨" --time "14:00" --mood "不知道干嘛"
